name: nanoka-genshin-scraper
description: Scrape et post-traitement des données Genshin Impact depuis gi.nanoka.cc

scripts.docker:scrape: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml run --rm scrape -m nanoka.scrape
scripts.docker:assign: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml run --rm pipeline -m nanoka.assign
scripts.docker:report:characters: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml run --rm pipeline -m nanoka.ascension_report --print
scripts.docker:report:weapons: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml run --rm pipeline -m nanoka.weapon_report
scripts.docker:report:talents: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml run --rm pipeline -m nanoka.talent_report
scripts.docker:full: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.yml --profile full up scrape post-process
